_comment: SAMPLE CONTENT — clearly illustrative 'demo geography', not a claim about any real coastline. All labels + markers are GEO-ANCHORED (lng/lat) so they pan/zoom with the live map — replace the lngLat values + the live regions/camera/basemap with real values when authoring. The map renders full-bleed at true viewport size (NO fitStage / CSS scale on the map), so MapLibre's projection math stays correct and telestration strokes anchor exactly.
headline: The Narrows
subhead: A fifth of seaborne trade funnels through one strait.

basemap.comment: Default is CARTO Dark Matter — a keyless, worldwide vector dark style that matches the on-air 'Dark' basemap preset and reads as a broadcast basemap at all zooms. Swap styleUrl for a MapTiler dark style (inline an origin-restricted key) for a richer surface, e.g. https://api.maptiler.com/maps/dataviz-dark/style.json?key=YOUR_KEY

camera.comment: Prefer `bounds` ([[west,south],[east,north]]) so the frame fits the area of interest on any wall; `center`/`zoom` are the fallback when no bounds are given.

_labelComment: lngLat anchors the geo marker on the LIVE map (the on-air render). x/y (in the 1920x1080 reference field) position the SAME label over the static SVG fallback so the OFFLINE render (and the headless harness, which can't composite live WebGL) is never blank — mirrors iran-alignment.

regions.label: Shipping approach
regions.comment: SAMPLE GEOMETRY — replace with real GeoJSON ([lng, lat] rings).
